findings.issue: Perspective weights are zero across all 13 registered perspectives — learning state does not persist, swarm adaptation is inactive. This collapses swarm to static prompt library.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate federated memory layer; implement spawn-count persistence; wire up learning feedback loop to PERSPECTIVES array

findings.issue: Code-index stale — no evidence of recent update despite active development. Risks divergence between file system reality and Atlas' operational map.
findings.recommended_fix: Run full code-index regeneration and validate against current repo state

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment incomplete — badge reward logic still risks contingent framing on mastery tasks. Inconsistent enforcement.
findings.recommended_fix: Finalize amendment, audit all badge triggers against Law 6, decouple from immediate assessment completion

whistleblower_flag: Perspective learning collapse breaks swarm autonomy — core architecture debt. Immediate risk to adaptive governance.
